original: Named after the brilliant Dr. Raymond Tardis, discoverer of the mutable space theory and quantum capacity inversion formula, this intelligently-designed crew module makes use of every inch of available space to provide comfortable accommodations for three individual living spaces in the volume of a single traditional crew berth. You remember hearing from your contacts in SteeleTech’s business department that he receives a couple credits from every sale for usage of his likeness.\n\n(+3 bonus crew capacity)
